name: Italian Sweet Fennel Sausage 4 Lbs.
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind the pork and fat together in a food grinder using a 3/8 inch plate.
2. Add garlic, salt, spices, and wine to the grinder. Mix thoroughly with your hands.
3. Shape the mixture into patties or stuff into casings.
4. Refrigerate for up to 3 days or freeze for up to 2-3 months.
